verify_commands: cd /Users/jihokang/Documents/Sisyphus && env PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/pycache ./.venv/bin/python -c "import importlib; import sisyphus.mcp_core, sisyphus.mcp_adapter, sisyphus.mcp_server, sisyphus.evolution, sisyphus.evolution.constraints; print(importlib.import_module('taskflow.mcp_core') is importlib.import_module('sisyphus.mcp_core')); print(importlib.import_module('taskflow.mcp_adapter') is importlib.import_module('sisyphus.mcp_adapter')); print(importlib.import_module('taskflow.mcp_server') is importlib.import_module('sisyphus.mcp_server')); print(importlib.import_module('taskflow.evolution.constraints') is importlib.import_module('sisyphus.evolution.constraints')); print(importlib.import_module('taskflow.evolution').plan_evolution_run is importlib.import_module('sisyphus.evolution').plan_evolution_run)"

normal_cases.name: Canonical `sisyphus.mcp_*` and `sisyphus.evolution.*` imports resolve to live local implementations.
Legacy `taskflow.mcp_*` imports and `taskflow.evolution.constraints` resolve to the same implementations used by `sisyphus`.

edge_cases.name: The MCP server still resolves repo roots and exposes the same tool and resource contracts after the ownership move.
Evolution planning, dataset, harness, constraint, fitness, and report helpers remain non-mutating where the tests expect read-only behavior.

exception_cases.name: Focused regressions across taskflow compatibility, MCP, evolution, event bus, and golden fixtures catch import-boundary breakage before the next migration slice.

verification_methods.target: Canonical MCP and evolution imports succeed
verification_methods.method: env PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/pycache ./.venv/bin/python -c "import importlib; import sisyphus.mcp_core, sisyphus.mcp_adapter, sisyphus.mcp_server, sisyphus.evolution, sisyphus.evolution.constraints; print(importlib.import_module('taskflow.mcp_core') is importlib.import_module('sisyphus.mcp_core')); print(importlib.import_module('taskflow.mcp_adapter') is importlib.import_module('sisyphus.mcp_adapter')); print(importlib.import_module('taskflow.mcp_server') is importlib.import_module('sisyphus.mcp_server')); print(importlib.import_module('taskflow.evolution.constraints') is importlib.import_module('sisyphus.evolution.constraints')); print(importlib.import_module('taskflow.evolution').plan_evolution_run is importlib.import_module('sisyphus.evolution').plan_evolution_run)"
